tasks.subject: Create the Lumen self-evolution campaign charter
tasks.description: Define the campaign mission, phase gates, allowed write scope, verification rules, rollback expectations, and evidence artifacts for evolving Lumen into a proposal-first builder.

payload.mission: Evolve Lumen from a content-oriented runtime into a proposal-first builder with bounded self-modification and verification-first execution.
acceptance_criteria: Defines mission, phases, gates, and evidence model
Defines allowed and disallowed self-modification behavior
Defines rollback and escalation rules
Defines completion criteria for the campaign
payload.operator_goal: Create the governing charter for Lumen self-evolution.

tasks.subject: Analyze current runtime gaps blocking proposal-first engineering
tasks.description: Inspect the runtime, profile, workflow, and artifact behavior to identify what prevents Lumen from operating as a proposal-first builder. Focus on write permissions, artifact collisions, grounding drift, and missing verification controls.

payload.mission: Identify the concrete gaps between the current Lumen runtime and the desired builder model.
acceptance_criteria: Identifies concrete failure modes from observed runs
Separates runtime gaps from profile/policy gaps
Identifies which gaps require code changes vs process changes
Produces an implementation-ready problem list
payload.operator_goal: Produce the gap analysis that should drive all self-evolution work.

tasks.subject: Write the builder-mode spec for Lumen
tasks.description: Define the profile, policy, workflow, artifact, and verification behavior for a builder-capable Lumen mode. Include proposal requirements, implementation boundaries, verification rules, and refusal conditions.

payload.mission: Specify the target operating model for Lumen as a bounded engineering agent.
acceptance_criteria: Specifies profile changes, tool policy, and write policy
Specifies proposal, implementation, verification, and rollback artifacts
Specifies campaign/task state expectations
Specifies safety and refusal conditions
payload.operator_goal: Create the engineering spec for Lumen builder mode.

tasks.subject: Plan the runtime changes required for Lumen builder mode
tasks.description: Translate the builder spec into an implementation plan with exact files, changes, verification steps, and rollout sequence.

payload.mission: Convert the builder-mode spec into an ordered implementation plan.
acceptance_criteria: Lists exact files and responsibilities
Defines sequencing and dependency order
Defines tests and runtime checks for each change
Defines rollback steps for each stage
payload.operator_goal: Produce the implementation plan for upgrading Lumen.

tasks.subject: Define the verification strategy for self-evolution changes
tasks.description: Create the test and runtime verification strategy required before Lumen builder-mode changes can be considered proven. Include snapshots, seeded tasks, healthchecks, and artifact validation.

payload.mission: Define how Lumen self-upgrades will be verified with evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Defines pre-change and post-change verification
Defines task-quality and artifact-quality checks
Defines failure classification and rollback triggers
Produces a repeatable proving loop
payload.operator_goal: Create the verification framework for all future self-evolution work.

tasks.subject: Produce the sequenced self-evolution program backlog
tasks.description: Using the charter, gap analysis, builder spec, implementation plan, and verification strategy, produce the exact next backlog for implementing Lumen builder mode.

payload.mission: Turn campaign analysis into the next execution backlog.
acceptance_criteria: Produces a sequenced execution backlog
Maps every planned item to a verifying artifact
Separates MVP upgrade steps from later hardening steps
Keeps recommendations bounded to observed evidence
payload.operator_goal: Generate the next execution program for Lumen self-evolution.
